modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use a casual conversational tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be no spelling errors and some irrelevant details included.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Need exemption for Panopto videos from retention policy.

full_description_text:  
I have some Panopto videos that I really want to keep, but I just found out they get deleted after three years if they haven't been viewed. It's a bit concerning since I need these videos to stay accessible for longer. Can you help me make sure they won't be archived?
short_description: Need exemption for Panopto videos from retention policy.
description: I have some Panopto videos that I really want to keep, but I just found out they get deleted after three years if they haven't been viewed. It's a bit concerning since I need these videos to stay accessible for longer. Can you help me make sure they won't be archived?
